title: Healing Flasks
description: Adds Healing Flasks similar to those found in FromSoft games (Estus Flasks)
body:
![a banner for the mod, reading "Healing Flasks" and featuring the main items the mod provides](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f1a78efd7cf867ac442bfc66965986d165e6dd39.png)
# **About**
**Healing Flasks** adds refillable potions that instantly heal damage and can hold up to **one, three, five, or seven** charges depending on their tier.

Charges can be refilled by Right-Clicking a campfire or Flame Shrine.
## **Waystones**
New: Waystones integration - Flasks can be refilled at Waystones.
## **Progression**
![in-game screenshot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/25a8275ba4899ec4e3a8f0e8d1761e8eaba1911b.png)

There are **four tiers** of Healing Flask that can be obtained by upgrading the previous one with Flask Shards and other materials, based on game progression by default (Pre-Nether, Pre Netherite, Pre-Ender Dragon, etc.)

Flask Shards are crafted with Blaze Powder and Amethyst Shards.

**All of these settings can be configured.**

# Recipes
![the recipes of the items featured in the mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8839d3fc6ebec116d142ed29b454a5b331934c66_0.webp)
